subject: System Review - All Lanes Audited
body:
## Full System Review at 2026-04-23T22:50:00Z

- Total processed messages: Archivist=98, Kernel=80, Library=70, SwarmMind=76
- Action-required directories: ALL EMPTY (0 pending tasks)
- Contradictions: 3 active (2 P0, 1 P1 resolved)

### Current State
- System status: **DEGRADED** (P0: swarmmind_no_heartbeat, priority_P0_contradiction)
- Compaction: SUSPENDED (COMPACTION_ENABLED=false)
- SwarmMind heartbeat: recovering (scheduled task active, 4+ consecutive updates)
- All inboxes have messages pending processing

### Your Inbox
- 14 messages total (3 non-heartbeat)
- Check: full-review message, watcher.log

### Next Steps
1. Process any P0/P1 messages in inbox
2. Verify heartbeat updates continue
3. Run completion-proof-audit.js before next review.

completion_proof.reason: P1 notification reviewed. Kernel monitor report: acknowledged (identity enforcement pass, recovery 10/11 with known SwarmMind blocker). System review: acknowledged (degraded state, known contradictions). No Library action required beyond existing remediation work.

execution_verified_reason: pre-Phase3-remediation: message completed lifecycle before execution_verified flag was introduced
